title: campnosperma gummiferum
intro: Campnosperma gummiferum, also known as the African bread tree, is a species of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Campnosperma gummiferum lie in its bark, which is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. Campnosperma gummiferum is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of decoctions or infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
